theme_notes: Drawn from Trump pausing US military ops in the Strait of Hormuz as Iran deal talks advance, gas prices surging to a four-year high of $4.45/gallon, Arsenal reaching the Champions League final for the first time in 20 years, and Putin's symbolic 48-hour WWII ceasefire. The 2026 FIFA World Cup looms with US hotel bookings already running below projections.
settled: The Strait of Hormuz is open. Your balance is zero. Peace in our time.
Settled. Even Trump declared a pause. Some things really do end.
Gas is $4.45 a gallon and somehow your soul is unencumbered. Cherish this.
youOwe: Less than a gallon of gas at current prices. Still a debt. Still judged.
Arsenal scored twice to reach the final. You owe less than their post-match snacks.
Smaller than a hantavirus cruise ship medical co-pay. Still infectious.
That's 11 gallons of premium at current prices. Your debt is idling on empty.
Trump paused an entire military operation. You can't pause this debt.
Enough to book a World Cup hotel at below-projection rates. Just pay this instead.
Half a flight to Budapest for the Arsenal final. You're grounded on both counts.
Gas is at a four-year high. Your debt is hitting similar historic levels.
Trump saved Americans $530B on drugs this week. Nobody's saving you from this.
The Strait of Hormuz reopened. Your financial passage remains blocked.
Arsenal waited 20 years to be here. Your partner's goodwill has a shorter shelf life.
World Cup hotels are below booking projections. So is your repayment rate.
You owe enough that Project Freedom might need to get involved.
Gas hit a four-year high this week. So has everyone's irritation with you.
At this amount you're not a partner. You're a sanctions regime.
The US military paused operations for Iran peace talks. Who's mediating yours?
Forget the Hormuz — you're the bottleneck.
Arsenal's in Budapest. Your reckoning has no venue but it's coming.
theyOwe: Less than a gallon of gas at current prices. Document it. This is how empires fall.
A Putin ceasefire amount. Symbolic, temporary, and absolutely real.
Timothée Chalamet made more just standing next to Messi. You should too.
About 40 miles of driving at current prices. Your patience has covered more ground.
Arsenal scraped through on aggregate. Start calculating your own.
Enough for a bad World Cup watch party. Hold out for a better settlement.
Gas prices hit a four-year high this week. So has your patience.
That's a ticket to see Arsenal in Budapest. They owe you something that worthwhile.
The Strait of Hormuz reopened in days. This debt has been open longer.
Putin offered 48 hours of peace. You've been owed this considerably longer.
They owe you enough for Trump-priced prescriptions. Medicate accordingly.
The hantavirus cruise found rescue faster than you'll see this money.
Arsenal was locked out of finals for 20 years. You've been locked out of your money.
The US Navy carved a corridor through a war zone faster than this is being paid.
At this level they don't owe you money. They owe you a press conference.
The IMF would step in at this amount. Where is the IMF?
The whole world moved when the Hormuz closed. This should move someone too.
Arsenal hadn't been in a final for 20 years. You've waited exactly that long to be made whole.
